name: review-architecture
when_to_use: When new needs may require updating the current architecture specification.
When the TUI should evaluate whether the architecture still fits the system needs.

steps.description: Gather the entities, entity relationships, invariants, and guidance context.
steps.details: Use the architecture context to understand the current model before judging whether it needs to change.

steps.description: Decide whether the current architecture specification needs to change.
steps.details: Compare the gathered entity model against the new needs. If the existing spec already covers them, report that no update is needed and stop.

steps.description: Generate and fill the architecture specification template only when changes are required.
steps.details: Run the architecture specification command, then fill the generated template with the required updates.

steps.description: Validate the updated architecture specification and confirm it is still consistent.
steps.details: Re-run architecture validation after edits and report any remaining inconsistencies.
